response_text:
No worries. The Kilo detour was worth exploring — now we know.

The good news: the session hook fix we deployed today is better than any external solution anyway:

- **Free** — no $17/mo MaxClaw, no Kilo
- **Within our control** — we own the logic
- **Solves the core problem** — captures actual conversation via sessions_history

Tomorrow we'll test it with /reset and see if I wake up remembering this conversation..

Thanks That's the real win for pushing through the tools glitch earlier. Now rest — we've done good work today. 🦞
